allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8901/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; if \($r.Content -match 'Stop fraud'\) { "OK: hero rendered" }; if \($r.Content -match 'SendLock'\) { "OK: brand present" }; if \($r.Content -match 'Request a Demo'\) { "OK: header CTA present" } } catch { "ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8901/login" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; "LOGIN STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; if \($r.Content -match 'SendLock'\) { "OK: branded auth" } } catch { "ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
PowerShell(php artisan test --filter="new users can register" 2>&1)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8902/register" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; if \($r.Content -match 'Create your organization'\) { "OK: heading" }; if \($r.Content -match 'Select your industry'\) { "OK: industry dropdown" }; if \($r.Content -match 'Work email'\) { "OK: admin fields" } } catch { "ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
